meta.note: Rebuilt from verified awards.json data. Card counts from roster.json (138-artist subset) or best known figure — flagged where approximate. Collection status current as of June 2026.

qualifying_credentials: Spectrum Fantastic Art — Gold Medal (any category)
Society of Illustrators — Gold Medal (NY or LA)
National Portrait Gallery London — selected exhibition (BP Portrait Award)
exceptions: OG MTG Lane — Alpha-era artist with personal/historical significance (case-by-case)
Exceptional gallery CV — MoCA / major museum exhibition level (case-by-case)
exclusions: Nominations without wins do NOT qualify (except NPG London and Comm Arts which are selection-based)

Bob Eggleton.mtg_cards_note: 19 per MTG Wiki / Scryfall — debut Mirage 1996, last Urza's Saga 1998
Bob Eggleton.notes: Supply permanently capped — stopped MTG work 1998. Godzilla/kaiju specialist.

Charles Urbach.credentials: Chesley Award: 2018 (Best Color Work Unpublished — Not All Treasure Is Gold), 2019 (Best Product Illustration — The Pirate Queen), 2020 (Best Gaming Related Illustration — King By His Own Hand), 2021 (Best Cover Paperback — Ghost Riders in the Sky). 4 Chesley wins.
Charles Urbach.notes: Direct purchase via Zelle. Alcohol ink and colored pencil techniques.

Dan Dos Santos.credentials: Chesley Award: 2007 (Best Cover Paperback — Moon Called), 2009 (Best Product Illustration — Hellboy 2 promo), 2014 (Best Cover Magazine — Fables #136). Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 20 Advertising Gold, Spectrum 22 Book Gold.
Dan Dos Santos.notes: Stoneforge Mystic (WWK) key card. Hugo win not confirmed from primary sources — removed.

David Palumbo.credentials: Chesley Award: 2013 (Best Gaming Related Illustration — Ereshkigal, Death Mistress). Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 18 Book Gold, Spectrum 20 Book Gold.

Diego Andrade.credentials: Framework exception — exceptional gallery CV: Gallery Nucleus, MoCA Bogotá, Soumaya Museum.
Diego Andrade.notes: Via Donny Caltrider. Now WotC MTG Art Director.

Donato Giancola.credentials: Hugo Award: 2006, 2007, 2009 (3 wins). Chesley Award: 1997, 1999, 2001, 2002 (×4 including Artistic Achievement + Gaming), 2004 (×2), 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008 (×5), 2009 (×2), 2011, 2014, 2015, 2016 (×2) — 23+ wins. World Fantasy Award: 2011. Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 13 Advertising Gold, Grandmaster Award Spectrum 26.
Donato Giancola.mtg_cards_note: 219 per MTG Wiki — debut Mirage 1996, last Bloomburrow 2024
Donato Giancola.notes: Anchor artist. Stopped new MTG work 2024 — supply permanently capped. Middle-earth AP series in discussion. Force of Will blank set aside.

Elliot Lang.credentials: Communication Arts 2026 Annual (juried selection). SOI-LA Silver Medal.
Elliot Lang.notes: 4 outstanding commissions ($1,600 total) on all 4 MTG debut cards.

Eric Wilkerson.credentials: Chesley Award: 2020 (Best Cover Illustration Hardcover — Tristan Strong Punches a Hole in the Sky).

Erol Otus.credentials: OG MTG Lane exception — Alpha-era D&D artist, personal and historical significance.
Erol Otus.notes: Connected on Facebook. Kokusho SLD borderless in collection. Featured in In Miniature III at Gallery Nucleus.

Gabor Szikszai.credentials: Chesley Award: 2006 (Best Gaming Related Illustration — Blazing Archon, with Zoltan Boros).

Iris Compiet.credentials: Chesley Award: 2021 (Best Interior Illustration — The Dark Crystal Bestiary, Insight Editions). Jack Gaughan Award. Ippy Gold Medal.
Iris Compiet.notes: Via Mark Arnowitz for signings. Outstanding commissions: Titania ($600) + Sylvan Tutor foil ($725) = $1,325.

J.P. Targete.credentials: Chesley Award: 2001 (Best Cover Illustration Paperback — Circle at Center by Douglas Niles).
J.P. Targete.notes: Arcane Signet #2 most played Commander card (6.58M decks). Food Chain Legacy staple.

Jason Chan.credentials: Chesley Award: 2011 (Best Cover Illustration Paperback — Geist by Phillippa Ballantine).

Jeremy Wilson.credentials: Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 24 Comics Gold. SOI-LA Gold Medal 2024. Star Wars/Lucasfilm credits.
Jeremy Wilson.mtg_cards_note: ~8 per roster.json — debut Streets of New Capenna 2022
Jeremy Wilson.notes: Elspeth Storm Slayer foil ($525) + Insidious Roots foil ($450) in collection.

Jon Foster.credentials: Chesley Award: 2019 (Best Cover Illustration Hardcover — I Met a Traveller in an Antique Land by Connie Willis).

Julie Benbassat.notes: 6 foil ECL pieces in collection, all arrived. Signs via MountainMage.

Julie Dillon.credentials: Hugo Award: 2014, 2015, 2017 (3 wins). Chesley Award: 2011, 2012, 2015 (×2), 2017 (5 wins). Locus Award — Best Artist: 2014, 2015, 2017, 2018 (4 wins). British Fantasy Award — Best Artist: 2016.
Julie Dillon.notes: Digital-first. Event-only APs. WFA: 5 nominations, 0 wins (confirmed sfadb).

Justin Sweet.credentials: Chesley Award: 2006 (Best Product Illustration — production design of The Lion, The Witch and the Wardrobe).
Justin Sweet.notes: Traditional oils. No dedicated AP store found. Direct outreach needed.

Kai Carpenter.credentials: Chesley Award: 2021 (Best Color Work Unpublished — The Selkie, oils). RISD trained. Traditional oils.
Kai Carpenter.notes: Dracogenesis foil (his MTG debut card) in collection.

Lindsey Look.credentials: Chesley Award: 2021 (Best Gaming Related Illustration — Sublime Epiphany, Core Set 2021). Traditional media.
Lindsey Look.notes: Active store. Signs via Mark Arnowitz.

Lucas Graciano.credentials: Chesley Award: 2010 (Best Gaming Related — Silverwing, Legends of Norrath), 2011 (Best Gaming Related — Amorphous Drake), 2014 (Best Gaming Related — Last Stand of Thorin Oakenshield). 3 Chesley wins.
Lucas Graciano.notes: Custom oil painted APs available. Contact: lucasgraciano@yahoo.com.

Marc Simonetti.credentials: Chesley Award: 2018 (Best Cover Illustration Hardcover — The Sword of Shannara by Terry Brooks, Grim Oak Press).
Marc Simonetti.notes: Very limited MTG card pool. Archangel of Thune top card.

Matthew Stewart.credentials: Chesley Award: 2010 (Best Cover Illustration Hardcover — Valley of Shadows) + 2010 (Best Product Illustration — Battle Under the Mountain). 2 Chesley wins.

Mitchell Malloy.credentials: Chesley Award: 2019 (Best Gaming Related Illustration — Frantic Search, Ultimate Masters).

Omar Rayyan.credentials: Chesley Award: 2005 (Best Cover Magazine — Spider + Artistic Achievement), 2007 (Best Interior — Cricket), 2012 (Best Color Work Unpublished — Dragon and the Nightingale + Lifetime Achievement), 2023 (Best Interior — Animal Farm, Suntup Editions). Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 15 Unpublished Gold, Spectrum 17 Book Gold, Spectrum 21 Unpublished Gold.
Omar Rayyan.notes: Beast Whisperer SLD (Bart), Stitcher's Supplier SLD (Bart), Amphibian Downpour MH3 in collection.

Peter Mohrbacher.credentials: Chesley Award: 2015 (Best Gaming Related — Pharika, God of Affliction, Journey into Nyx), 2016 (Best Interior Illustration — Angelarium: Book of Emanations). 2 Chesley wins.
Peter Mohrbacher.notes: Stopped MTG 2014. Works exclusively on Angelarium. No painted AP pathway.

Raoul Vitale.credentials: Chesley Award: 2010 (Best Color Work Unpublished — Unrequited), 2012 (Best Monochrome Unpublished — The Yeti), 2013 (Best Monochrome Unpublished — Last of His Kind), 2015 (Best Cover Paperback — Nebula Awards Showcase 2014). Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 19 Institutional Gold.
Raoul Vitale.notes: Traditional oils. One foil Aether Vial AP remaining at $750 + $600 painted back.

Rebecca Guay.credentials: Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 18 Comics Gold (A Flight of Angels) + Spectrum 18 Unpublished Gold (Pandora). SOI-LA Gold Medal 2013 (Illustration West 51, Original Works/Gallery category).
Rebecca Guay.mtg_cards_note: 162 per MTG Wiki — debut Alliances 1996, last SL Spring Superdrop 2023
Rebecca Guay.notes: Left MTG 2013 — supply permanently capped. Titania foil + 5-color Fairy Bitterbloom series /100 in collection.

Rovina Cai.credentials: Hugo Award: 2021, 2022, 2024 (3 wins). World Fantasy Award: 2019, 2021 (2 wins). Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 22 Institutional Gold, Spectrum 23 Book Gold, Spectrum 27 Book Gold.
Rovina Cai.notes: Shop drops only. No custom commissions. Signs via Mark Arnowitz. HIGHEST acquisition priority.

Ryan Pancoast.credentials: Chesley Award: 2023 (Best Gaming Related Illustration — Discover the Impossible, Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty).
Ryan Pancoast.notes: Active AP store. 200+ MTG cards in oils. Top card: Cavern of Souls AVR.

Ryan Yee.credentials: Chesley Award: 2016 (Best Gaming Related — Fruit of the First Tree, Fate Reforged), 2017 (Best Gaming Related — Die Young, Kaladesh). 2 Chesley wins.
Ryan Yee.notes: Sudden Edict MH2 painted AP in collection.

Todd Lockwood.credentials: Chesley Award: 1996, 1997, 1998, 1999, 2001 (×2 including Special Award), 2003 (×3), 2004 (×4 including Artistic Achievement), 2007, 2008, 2013, 2014, 2016 — 17+ wins.
Todd Lockwood.notes: Painted APs listed as coming soon on website.

Tran Nguyen.credentials: World Fantasy Award: 2022. Chesley Award: 2016 (Best Cover Magazine — Uncanny #4), 2017 (Best Cover Hardcover — Kushiel's Dart). Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 21 Editorial Gold (Insects of Love), Spectrum 22 Editorial Gold, Spectrum 23 Editorial Gold.
Tran Nguyen.mtg_cards_note: ~12 per roster.json — debut War of the Spark 2019
Tran Nguyen.notes: Eshki Dragonclaw TDM foil in collection.

Tyler Jacobson.credentials: Chesley Award: 2016 (Best Cover Paperback — Beyond the Pool of Stars). Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 19 Advertising Gold, Spectrum 23 Institutional Gold.
Tyler Jacobson.notes: Confirmed SCGCon LA October 9-11 2026. AFR cards are priority targets.

Volkan Baga.credentials: Chesley Award: 2009 (Best Gaming Related — Stoic Angel, Shards of Alara). National Portrait Gallery London: BP Portrait Award 2014 selected exhibition.
Volkan Baga.notes: Direct inquiry only. Low market competition. Classical technique.

Zoltan Boros.credentials: Chesley Award: 2006 (Best Gaming Related — Blazing Archon, with Gabor Szikszai).

Jeremy Wilson.credentials: Spectrum Gold: Spectrum 24 Comics Gold. SOI-LA Gold Medal 2024.
Jeremy Wilson.notes: Elspeth Storm Slayer foil + Insidious Roots foil in collection.

John Avon.credentials: No framework wins confirmed. Nominations only.

Seb McKinnon.notes: Popular community artist but no framework credentials.

Terese Nielsen.credentials: No framework wins confirmed. Nominations only.

Christopher Rush.credentials: No framework wins confirmed. OG MTG Lane arguable (Black Lotus artist) but not applied.

Phil Foglio.credentials: OG MTG Lane exception — Alpha-era Antiquities 1994 artist. Hugo Award wins (Girl Genius, Graphic Story category — different category, not Best Professional Artist). Personal significance.
Phil Foglio.notes: SCGCon LA October 9-11 2026 confirmed guest. 6 blanks sourced.

Kaja Foglio.credentials: OG MTG Lane exception — Arabian Nights 1993 artist. Personal significance.
Kaja Foglio.mtg_cards_note: 63 per MTG Wiki — debut Arabian Nights 1993
Kaja Foglio.notes: SCGCon LA October 9-11 2026 confirmed guest. 6 blanks sourced.

Mark Tedin.credentials: OG MTG Lane exception — Alpha-era 1993 artist. Personal significance.
Mark Tedin.notes: SCGCon LA October 9-11 2026 confirmed guest. Blanks being identified.

Randy rk Post.credentials: OG MTG Lane adjacent — Exodus 1998 debut, long-tenured MTG artist.
Randy rk Post.notes: SCGCon LA October 9-11 2026 confirmed guest. Mirari's Wake (original Judgment printing) target.
